Name: SurPro 20-30" Magnesium Double Sided Stilt (SURS2M2030)
Description:
SurPro 20-30" Magnesium Double Sided Stilt (SURS2M2030) provides a stable, high-performance platform for drywall contractors requiring extended reach. The double-sided pole configuration minimizes lateral sway and twisting, ensuring a secure stance during ceiling installation, taping, or finishing tasks. Constructed from a lightweight magnesium alloy, these stilts reduce operator fatigue while maintaining the structural integrity necessary for daily, heavy-duty site use.

The S2 series incorporates an ergonomic design that adapts to the user's natural movement. The 360-degree wraparound leg bands distribute pressure evenly, while the adjustable footbed, calf height, and lean tension settings allow for a personalized fit that supports biomechanical efficiency throughout the workday.

Features:

  • Interlock Safety System: Patented redundancy mechanism secures critical stress points to ensure operational safety.
  • Hex-Extruded Frame: Hexagonal geometry maximizes structural rigidity while keeping the overall weight low for extended wear.
  • Double-Clamshell Design: Prevents common twisting motions, providing superior lateral stability compared to single-pole alternatives.
  • Precision Adjustability: Offers full customization of leg band position, footplate length, and forward/backward lean tension.
  • High-Traction Soles: Industrial-grade, non-marking rubber soles provide reliable grip across various residential and commercial flooring surfaces.
